ddls:
CREATE TABLE "derivatives" (
  "derivative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derivative */,
  "notional_amount" REAL /* Notional amount of the derivative */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the derivative */,
  "counterparty" TEXT /* Counterparty for the derivative */,
  "buy_sell_protection" TEXT /* Type of protection (buy or sell) */,
  "receive_pay_fixed_rate" REAL /* Fixed rate for receive (pay) */,
  "deliverable_on_default" TEXT /* Deliverable on default */,
  "net_unrealized_appreciation" REAL /* Net unrealized appreciation (or depreciation) */,
  "derivative_type" TEXT /* Type of derivative (option, future, swap) */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset or security */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price for options */,
  "contract_size" INTEGER /* Size of the contract */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the derivative */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the derivative was entered into the portfolio */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the derivative (active, expired, etc.) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the derivative information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("derivative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_derivatives_counterparty FOREIGN KEY ("counterparty") REFERENCES counterparties ("counterparty_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "counterparties" (
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each counterparty */,
  "counterparty_name" TEXT /* Name of the counterparty */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the counterparty */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the counterparty */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the counterparty */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the counterparty */,
  "relationship_manager" TEXT /* Name of the relationship manager */,
  "account_manager" TEXT /* Name of the account manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the counterparty was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the counterparty information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counterparty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_types" (
  "reporting_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting type */,
  "reporting_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting type */,
  "report_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the report (daily, weekly, monthly, etc.) */,
  "required_fields" TEXT /* JSON object of required fields for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the reporting type was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the reporting type information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporting_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "reporting_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting type */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "cik" INTEGER /* CIK (Central Index Key) */,
  "derivative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the derivative */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL where the report can be accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (draft, final, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_derivative_id FOREIGN KEY ("derivative_id") REFERENCES derivatives ("derivative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reporting_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_type_id") REFERENCES reporting_types ("reporting_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., risk manager, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the institution */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the derivative */,
  "derivative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the derivative being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the derivative was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_derivative_id FOREIGN KEY ("derivative_id") REFERENCES derivatives ("derivative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stress_tests" (
  "stress_test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stress test */,
  "derivative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the derivative being tested */,
  "stress_test_date" TEXT /* Date when the stress test was performed */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the stress test */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the stress test scenario */,
  "scenario_description" TEXT /* Description of the stress test scenario */,
  "test_parameters" TEXT /* JSON object of parameters used in the stress test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the stress test was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the stress test information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stress_test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_tests_derivative_id FOREIGN KEY ("derivative_id") REFERENCES derivatives ("derivative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "derivative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the derivative related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was triggered */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., approaching expiration date) */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification (user ID or email) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read (true, false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_derivative_id FOREIGN KEY ("derivative_id") REFERENCES derivatives ("derivative_id")
)
